ddls:
CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "category_image" TEXT /* Image representing the product category */,
  "category_status" TEXT /* Status of the product category (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent product category */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the product subcategory (e.g., shirts, pants, skirts) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product subcategory */,
  "subcategory_image" TEXT /* Image representing the product subcategory */,
  "subcategory_status" TEXT /* Status of the product subcategory (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_subcategories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement chart */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product subcategory the chart belongs to */,
  "international_size" TEXT /* International size (e.g., 2XS, XS, S) */,
  "us_size" INTEGER /* US size (e.g., 30, 32, 34) */,
  "chest" TEXT /* Chest measurement (e.g., 31" (80cm)) */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement (e.g., 26" (68cm)) */,
  "hips" TEXT /* Hips measurement (e.g., 35" (91cm)) */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement chart (e.g., men's, women's, kids') */,
  "chart_status" TEXT /* Status of the measurement chart (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_charts_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES product_subcategories ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer's account */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the measurement belongs to */,
  "chest" TEXT /* Chest measurement (e.g., 31" (80cm)) */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement (e.g., 26" (68cm)) */,
  "hips" TEXT /* Hips measurement (e.g., 35" (91cm)) */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date the measurement was taken or updated */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to obtain the measurement (e.g., manual, automatic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the size belongs to */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product subcategory the size belongs to */,
  "international_size" TEXT /* International size (e.g., 2XS, XS, S) */,
  "us_size" INTEGER /* US size (e.g., 30, 32, 34) */,
  "size_status" TEXT /* Status of the preferred size (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_sizes_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES product_subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_sizes_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered, cancelled) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "shipping_carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used for the order (e.g., USPS, UPS, FedEx) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the item belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "product_price" TEXT /* Price of the product in the order */,
  "product_size" TEXT /* Size of the product in the order (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "product_color" TEXT /* Color of the product in the order (e.g., red, blue, green) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product subcategory the product belongs to */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES product_subcategories ("subcategory_id")
)
